summary: Investigated the AI issue (T-006) and found it was a false positive. The browser subagent in M-005 failed to click the native <select> properly, leaving the game in PVP mode. I have documented this limitation and rules for testing the AI in agents/AG_cursorrules.md so it won't happen again. Also fixed the CSS contrast issue on the game mode select.
output: CSS contrast fixed in styles.css. AG_cursorrules.md updated. TESTING_PLAN.md updated to reflect AI works.
